title: Depot Patience: Cooldown-Aware Overnight Charging
strategies: immediate full-power FCFS (checker's own baseline, and the trivial tier): charge every bus the instant it arrives at max power, first-come-first-served over the shared berths

flat moderate-power FCFS (the obvious 'average coder' recipe): charge every bus the instant a berth is free at a single fixed half-max power, never voluntarily delaying and never adapting power to any one bus's own heat

best-improvement exchange local search: start every bus at the always-feasible immediate full-power schedule, then repeatedly find and apply the single (bus, one-power-step-gentler) move with the largest degradation payoff that is still feasible against the live shared berth timeline, re-scanning after every move until no beneficial move remains
any other feasibility-respecting schedule (e.g. a global optimizer, simulated annealing over per-bus power profiles) is valid input space too
